iterations.theme: The Genesis and Core Philosophy of Slugline
iterations.reason_for_cut: This section concludes the discussion on Slugline's foundational design principles and the hosts' personal journeys, transitioning before the detailed breakdown of business models.

iterations.theme: Business Models, Platform Expansion, and the Future of Screenwriting Tools
iterations.reason_for_cut: This section begins with a new major topic (business models) and covers the evolution of Slugline across platforms, its marketing, and the broader philosophy of screenwriting as a technical craft, concluding with guest inspirations and the podcast outro.
